microsoft_ft: Embedded with enterprise customers — **Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp** — to deploy and validate distributed resilience systems, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized program sustaining 45+ annual production drills.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation capability, delivering a full drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects across production infrastructure.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility across distributed systems.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% — directly extending team throughput without headcount growth.
microsoft_2023: Drove **adoption of AI-powered code generation** tooling across 14 Azure service teams through on-site demos and hands-on enablement sessions, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating developer onboarding.
Improved **semantic search** fidelity and data retrieval speed by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered search pipeline, cutting lookup time by 83%.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into actionable requirements.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in pull-forward revenue.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built and delivered a roadmap to automate critical ETL and deployment paths across the pipeline.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot across 1,200+ stations, mapping all system dependencies and achieving zero operational downtime throughout the production rollout.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention in distributed system updates.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional delivery across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that standardized data capture and reduced pipeline leakage.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to improve qualified lead flow.

Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model improvements that strengthened per-job contribution margins.
